spell.illusionist_grimoire.illusion_wall: Creates an illusionary wall ahead of the caster for 30 seconds, making entities lose track of it.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.depth_trick.d: Creates a strong distortion in the target's eyes, making him see entities in sizes that shouldn't be possible. Only works on players.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.paranoia.desc: Casts a strong illusion on the target, making it suffer from hallucinations for some time.
